<style>
section {
  padding: 30 0 50 0px;
  margin-left: 20px;
  margin-top: 70px;
}


/*--------------COLUMNS*/
/* Main Section Headings and sub headings */
article .columnar ~ h2,
article .columnar ~ h2 + p {
    width: 100%;
    clear: both;
}

/* Columns */
article .columnar ~ h3,
article .columnar ~ p,
article .columnar ~ .bar {
    width: 50%;
}

/* Left Column */
article .columnar ~ h3,
article .columnar ~ p {
    float: left;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding-right: 1rem;
    clear: both;
}

/* Right Column */
article .columnar ~ .bar {
    float: right;
    clear: right;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

/* Reset */
article .oneline ~ p,
article .oneline ~ h3,
article .oneline ~ .bar {
    width: auto;
    float: none;
    clear: none;
}

.oneline {
    clear: both;
}

@media print, screen and (max-width: 580px) {

/*----------------------------
    Two column layout media
  ---------------------------*/
 

}

.oneline ~ p {
    font-style: normal;
    font-size: 1rem;
}
</style>
